title: cyrtomium devexiscapulae
intro: Cyrtomium devexiscapulae, also known as the Cyrtomium fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a type of medicinal plant traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the treatment of various health issues. The medicinal properties of Cyrtomium devexiscapulae include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which contribute to its health benefits such as wound healing, reducing pain and inflammation, and fighting infections. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
